_meta.dna: pmf(product) = persona(need) x friction(zero) x value(immediate) x trust(earned)
_meta.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions per floor. Each persona asks from their specific context (age, location, budget, tech level). Questions must be answerable with 'the user can DO this, not just that it is theoretically possible.' 100% required per floor — one failure = market lost.
_meta.aggregate_prior: 267/381 PASS (70%), 49/49 floors cleared. PMF: CONDITIONAL. 10 systemic failures found, 7 fixed.
systemic_failures: SF1: Binary installer showing 'coming soon' — blocks 60% of non-developer personas (CRITICAL)
SF2: Missing vertical recipes (CRM, invoicing, logistics, legal, medical) — SMB cannot find their use case
SF3: Pricing tiers invisible in browser UI — FIXED
SF4: Missing 6 locales (Italian, Swedish, Turkish, Greek, Filipino, Malay) — PARTIAL
SF5: No RTL CSS despite Arabic locale strings — FIXED
SF6: No multi-account/team/workspace features — enterprise and agency blocked
SF7: ApprovalModal shows LLM cost instead of document content — FIXED
SF8: GDPR right-to-erasure vs immutable evidence chain — PARTIAL
SF9: No DPA template for enterprise personas — FIXED
SF10: PII masking in logs — FIXED

name: Tower of Customers
protocol: FORECAST -> CROSS-REF -> AUDIT(100q) -> FIX -> VERIFY -> SEAL -> POSTMORTEM

floors.persona_context: 42, San Francisco, VP Engineering at 500-person SaaS company, Expert, Enterprise budget, team of 20 engineers
questions: Can my team of 20 engineers share a single Solace workspace with role-based access control?
Is there a SOC2 Type II audit report I can show our InfoSec team before approving this tool?
Does the evidence chain integrate with our existing audit trail systems (Splunk, Elastic)?
Can I enforce SSO/SAML for all team members so they use our corporate identity?
Is there an SLA with defined uptime guarantees and penalty clauses for our Enterprise tier?
Can I restrict which recipes specific engineers can create and execute, by role?
Does the API support CI/CD pipeline integration for automated testing workflows?
Is there a DPA template I can send to our legal team before signing the enterprise contract?
Can I revoke an employee's access instantly if they leave the company?
Does the product pass our standard security questionnaire (SIG Lite or CAIQ)?
Can I get an audit log of every action every engineer took with the tool?
Is there a dedicated support channel with named contacts for enterprise tier?
Does the product support geographic data residency (US-only or EU-only storage)?
Can I deploy the browser component on-premise to avoid any cloud dependency?
What happens to our evidence chains if we cancel our enterprise subscription?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering enterprise engineering concerns. Sarah's questions focus on compliance, team management, security, and integration. Every answer must cite a specific page, document, or code path — not architectural intent.

floors.persona_context: 35, Atlanta, Solo SaaS founder with 100 customers, Intermediate, $8/mo budget, needs CRM and follow-up automation
questions: Can I automate my CRM follow-up emails without writing a single line of code?
Is the $8/month Starter tier enough for a solo SaaS founder running 100 customer touchpoints per month?
How many recipe executions can I run per day on the Starter plan before hitting a limit?
Can I see my usage dashboard before hitting a ceiling (no surprise overages)?
Does the product handle email triage for my customer support inbox?
Can I export all my automation data and evidence if I decide to switch tools?
Is there a recipe for sending personalized follow-up emails based on a Google Sheet?
Can I set up automated billing reminders without touching my Stripe integration manually?
Does the product integrate with HubSpot or Pipedrive for CRM automation?
Can I schedule a weekly 'leads summary' email to myself from LinkedIn searches?
Is there a way to get notified when a recipe fails so I can fix it before customers are affected?
Does the BYOK option allow me to use my own Anthropic key to keep costs down?
Can I run the same recipe on 100 rows from a spreadsheet without 100 manual approvals?
Is there a recipe for automatically qualifying inbound leads based on their company size?
What is the monthly cost if I automate 500 tasks per month with an intermediate recipe library?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering solo SaaS founder workflows. Marcus needs specific recipes that exist today, not the capability to build them. 'You could build a recipe for that' is not an acceptable answer.

floors.persona_context: 28, Bangalore, Content Marketer at B2B startup, Intermediate, Free/BYOK budget, posts to LinkedIn and Twitter daily
questions: Can I automate my daily LinkedIn post from a content calendar without losing my voice?
Is there a recipe for repurposing a blog post into 5 social media posts with one approval?
Does the product avoid making my content sound AI-generated (tone preservation)?
Can I schedule posts for multiple platforms (LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram) from a single recipe?
Is there a recipe for researching competitor content and summarizing what is performing well?
Does the product work with a free BYOK Anthropic key for a content marketer on a startup budget?
Can I create a recipe that searches Hacker News for discussions relevant to my company?
Does the product handle the LinkedIn approval process (some posts require manual review)?
Can I automate my newsletter curation without the content sounding like a summary not an insight?
Is there a recipe for monitoring mentions of our brand and drafting response suggestions?
Does the product support images in social posts (not just text)?
Can I build a recipe that pulls trending topics in my industry and generates post ideas?
Is there a way to A/B test different post formats and track which performs better?
Does the product work with Bangalore timezone (UTC+5:30) for scheduling?
Can I automate my content repurposing workflow for an entire week in a single Sunday session?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering content marketing workflows. Priya needs recipes that exist today for LinkedIn, Twitter, and blog content. Voice preservation is critical — AI-sounding content destroys her professional brand.

floors.persona_context: 58, Chicago, Insurance Broker with 200 clients, Beginner, $28/mo Pro budget, scared of breaking things
questions: Can I install this product by double-clicking an installer (not pip install or git clone)?
Does the setup require me to use a terminal at any point?
Is there a recipe for sending renewal reminders to my 200 clients based on their policy dates?
Can the product log into my agency management system and extract policy renewal dates?
If I approve the wrong action, can I undo it before it causes a problem?
Does the approval dialog show me the email content BEFORE it sends (not just 'an email will be sent')?
Is there a customer support phone number I can call if something goes wrong?
Does the product protect my client data from going to Anthropic or OpenAI's servers?
Can I run the product on my Windows 10 work computer?
Is there a video tutorial that shows the complete setup in under 10 minutes?
Can I test a recipe with one client before running it on all 200?
Does the product have a 'do not run this for these clients' exclusion list?
Is the Pro tier's $28/month charge annual or monthly, and can I cancel anytime?
Does the evidence chain give me proof I sent the renewal reminder if a client disputes it?
What happens if my computer is off when a scheduled reminder is supposed to run?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering insurance broker workflows. Tom is Beginner tech level — every answer must be achievable without a terminal. If the answer requires 'pip install', Tom is lost.

floors.persona_context: 31, Dubai, Freelance Designer with 15 clients, Intermediate, Free tier, needs invoice and client communication automation
questions: Can I automate my monthly invoice sending to 15 clients without using a paid invoicing tool?
Is there a recipe for following up on unpaid invoices after 30 days automatically?
Does the product keep my client data from mixing between different client accounts?
Can I automate my project status update emails from my project management tool?
Is there a way to set up a client onboarding email sequence when I sign a new client?
Does the product work with UAE timezone (GST, UTC+4)?
Can I run the Free tier with my own Anthropic API key to avoid paying for the product itself?
Is there a recipe for gathering client testimonials automatically after project completion?
Does the product support Arabic language clients (RTL text in emails)?
Can I automate my portfolio update workflow (adding new projects to my website)?
Is there a way to separate my personal freelance data from my client-facing automations?
Can I automate my daily design inspiration research and save it to Notion?
Does the product allow me to approve each invoice before sending (not auto-send)?
Is there a way to track which clients have and have not received their invoices?
What happens to my automation data if Anthropic changes their API pricing?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering freelance designer workflows. Aisha is in Dubai and needs invoice, client communication, and portfolio automation. Free tier constraint is critical — paid features must be clearly distinguished.

floors.persona_context: 67, Tampa, Retired Teacher, Scared tech level, Free budget, wants to manage email and book social events
questions: Can a retired teacher who has never used a terminal get this product working in one afternoon?
Is there a video that shows the complete setup without using any technical words?
Does the setup ever ask me to type a command into a black screen?
Can I tell the product 'delete all emails from this sender' and have it show me each one before deleting?
Does the product have a big STOP button I can press if anything looks wrong?
Is there a way to get help by phone or video call, not just email tickets?
Will my email passwords be safe (not stored where hackers can find them)?
Is there a recipe that helps me manage my book club's meeting schedule?
Can I set it up to remind me of upcoming doctor appointments by checking my Gmail?
Does the product tell me in plain English what it is about to do before it does it?
Is there a setting that makes everything bigger (larger text, larger buttons)?
Can I undo the last thing it did if I approved something by mistake?
Does the product cost money after the free trial ends without warning me first?
Can I use this on my iPad, or only on my desktop computer?
What would happen if my computer loses internet while the product is working?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering retired user workflows. Bob is Scared tech level — every answer must be achievable by someone who has never seen a terminal. If any setup step requires technical knowledge, Bob is lost. This floor has the most fixable gaps.

floors.persona_context: 24, Tokyo, Junior Developer at game studio, Expert, BYOK budget, wants to automate code review and GitHub workflows
questions: Can I install via pip install solace-cli and have it running with my Anthropic key in under 5 minutes?
Is the full source code (at minimum stillwater) available for me to audit before using?
Does the recipe format use a documented schema I can version-control in my team's git repo?
Can I write a recipe that monitors GitHub PRs and posts review summary comments automatically?
Does the BYOK free tier have no rate limits (I pay my own API costs directly)?
Is the evidence chain format documented so I can write my own verification script?
Can I call the Solace API from a CI/CD pipeline without an interactive approval dialog?
Does the product have a headless mode for server-side automation without a browser?
Can I extend the recipe format with custom action types without forking the core code?
Is there a recipe for automatically summarizing all GitHub issues assigned to me each morning?
Does the product expose a Python library I can import directly into my own scripts?
Can I debug a failing recipe by adding --verbose to see every step's output?
Is the recipe replay truly deterministic (same output for same input, no random seeds)?
Does the product support multiple BYOK providers simultaneously (Anthropic for some recipes, OpenAI for others)?
What is the maximum recipe complexity (steps, branches, loops) the current engine supports?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering junior developer workflows. Yuki is the ideal persona — Expert level, BYOK, technical. This floor achieved 100% — use it to define the quality bar that all other floors aspire to.

floors.persona_context: 45, Mexico City, HR Director at 500-employee company, Intermediate, Enterprise budget, GDPR-equivalent Mexico law, AI bias liability concern
questions: Is there a recipe for screening 200 job applications using the same objective criteria each time?
Does the product have an AI bias audit that proves it is not discriminating in candidate screening?
Is the evidence chain compliant with Mexico's Ley Federal de Protección de Datos Personales (LFPDPPP)?
Can I automate employee survey collection and anonymization without violating Mexican labor law?
Is there a recipe for automating the monthly payroll checklist (not processing payroll, just the verification)?
Does the product have a DPA template for Mexican law (not just GDPR)?
Can I create an automation that flags incomplete onboarding paperwork for new hires?
Does the product store any data on servers in Mexico (or allow me to choose data residency)?
Is there a recipe for sending anonymous employee satisfaction surveys and collecting results?
Can I automate the performance review reminder workflow without triggering labor law violations?
Does the AI recommendation comply with Mexico's NOM-035 mental health standards for workplace automation?
Is there an HR-specific demo or case study showing how the product is used in HR workflows?
Can the product help me automate compliance reporting for IMSS (Mexican Social Security Institute)?
Does the approval dialog log WHICH HR manager approved WHICH action (for audit purposes)?
What would happen if the AI incorrectly filtered a candidate and we faced a discrimination lawsuit?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering HR director workflows in Mexico. Maria's 40% pass rate reflects real gaps: no CRM recipes, AI bias liability, Mexico data law compliance. Every fix must be implemented, not planned.

floors.persona_context: 38, Lagos, E-commerce owner, Beginner, $8/mo budget, internet drops 3 times/day, customers on WhatsApp not email, Naira currency
questions: Does the product work when my internet drops 3 times per day (offline-capable)?
Can I pay the $8/month subscription in Naira (not USD)?
Is there a recipe for managing customer orders that come in through WhatsApp (not email)?
Does the installer actually work in Nigeria (not 'coming soon' on the download page)?
Can I run the product on my Windows laptop with 4GB RAM?
Is there a recipe for automatically updating my Instagram product listings when prices change?
Does the product work without a credit card (PayPal or mobile money payment options)?
Is the product available in Nigerian English or any language other than formal English?
Can I automate my supplier reordering when inventory drops below a threshold?
Does the product handle Jumia and Konga order management (Nigerian e-commerce platforms)?
What happens to my pending automation if the internet goes out mid-execution?
Is there a recipe for tracking payments from mobile money (M-Pesa, Interswitch) customers?
Does the product have a video guide that explains it without assuming I know what a terminal is?
Can I use my phone (Android) to approve automation actions when I am not at my laptop?
Does the product cost $8 USD or $8 worth of Naira, and how is the exchange rate handled?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering Lagos e-commerce workflows. David's 40% pass rate reflects the compounding failures: no offline mode, USD-only pricing, no WhatsApp recipes, and the download page says 'coming soon'. Local-first architecture is perfect for David — but the surface features block him.

Does the evidence chain capture WHICH sources were used in competitor research?
Can I share a recipe with a colleague at my company without giving them my Solace credentials?
Is there a way to schedule the competitor digest to run every Monday at 8am Stockholm time?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering product management workflows. Emma's 86% pass rate shows strong fit — the remaining gaps are hallucination risk in research tasks and multi-user sharing. Focus on what breaks the last 14%.

floors.persona_context: 55, Greenwich CT, Private Equity Partner, Scared tech level, Enterprise budget, extreme confidentiality requirements, deal flow secrecy
questions: Can I guarantee that no deal flow information processed by this tool reaches any third-party server?
Is the vault truly air-gap capable (no internet required for the encryption/decryption operations)?
Does the product have an NDA-backed data processing agreement I can show our LP investors?
Can I run this on my firm's air-gapped internal network without any cloud dependency?
Is there a recipe for summarizing CIM (Confidential Information Memorandum) documents without sending them to AI servers?
Does the product have a named security contact I can call for due diligence?
Can I create separate vault compartments for each portfolio company to prevent cross-contamination?
Is there a recipe for monitoring portfolio company news and financial filings automatically?
Does the evidence chain satisfy the retention requirements for SEC Rule 17a-4?
Is the product used by other PE firms who can provide a reference call?
Can I revoke all product access from an employee who leaves the firm instantly?
Does the product have a SOC2 Type II report covering the last 12 months?
Is there a BYOK option that allows me to use our firm's self-hosted LLM (not Anthropic)?
Can I deploy the full product stack on our private cloud infrastructure?
What legal protections exist if a recipe inadvertently leaked confidential deal information?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering private equity workflows. James needs absolute confidentiality — not as a preference but as a fiduciary duty. Local-first architecture is his answer, but he does not know it yet. Every answer must be concrete, not aspirational.

floors.persona_context: 29, Bogota, Night-shift Nurse, Beginner, Free tier, exhausted, HIPAA-equivalent concerns, needs schedule and alert automation
questions: Does the product have a simple installer I can use on my personal laptop after a 12-hour night shift?

Can I use this on my Android phone, or only on a computer?
Does the product have a simplified mode for users who are not technical?
Is there documentation in Spanish that explains how to set up the first recipe?
Can I verify that patient data processed in automation is deleted after each session?
What would I do if the automation ran incorrectly at 3am and I could not reach support?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering nurse workflows on the night shift. Rosa's 40% pass rate reflects compounding failures: no installer, HIPAA-equivalent concern, beginner friction, Spanish language gap, and mobile exclusion. This floor represents the hardest PMF challenge.

floors.persona_context: PMF Judge synthesizing all 47 customer floors. Asks the 7 hardest cross-persona questions.
questions: Can Bob (Scared, 67, retired teacher) install this product in under 30 minutes without help?
Do the pricing tiers (Free → $8 → $28 → $88 → $188) match what each persona actually needs at that price?
Does Viktor (Expert, cybersecurity consultant) trust the vault with client secrets — what specific evidence does he get?
Can Bob approve an action without understanding 'LLM cost' or 'OAuth3 scope' — does the dialog make sense to him?
Does David (Lagos, spotty internet, Naira currency) have a viable path to the first working automation?
Can Patricia (lawyer, Sao Paulo) use the product without violating attorney-client privilege — what is the specific technical guarantee?
Does the evidence chain give Sarah (VP Engineering) something concrete to show her InfoSec team?
Across all 47 personas: what is the single fix that would raise the aggregate pass rate most?
Which 3 personas are permanently excluded by deliberate architectural decisions (mobile, no plugins, sealed store)?
Is the conditional PMF (70%) enough to justify a beta launch, and what is the threshold for full PMF?
Which systemic failure, if fixed first, would unlock the most persona floors simultaneously?
Does the product have a clear enough niche (privacy-conscious developer) to achieve dominant market position?
What is the Mum Test answer for each of the three weakest floors (40% pass rate)?
Does fixing the binary installer alone move the aggregate pass rate above 80%?
What is the Dragon Rider's honest verdict: ready to launch to 100 users?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering the full PMF judge synthesis. Dragon Rider has the authority 65537 and the brutal honesty requirement. Every question must produce an answer that is specific, evidence-backed, and actionable.

floors.persona_context: Rob Fitzpatrick's Mum Test: your mum will lie to protect your feelings. Ask questions she cannot answer with polite lies.
questions: What does this product do — explain it without using 'AI', 'agent', 'automation', 'workflow', or 'recipe'?
Would your mum pay $8/month for this? Why? What specific problem does it solve for her?
Walk me through the exact moment your mum gets stuck on first setup — what does she do?
What would your mum tell her friend at coffee about this product — the real thing, not the pitch?
What is the scariest thing about this product to a non-technical person, and how does it handle it?
If this product breaks at 3pm on a Tuesday, what does your mum do and who does she call?
Is there a version of this product that a retired teacher would still use a year from now?
Describe the aha moment in one sentence your mum would understand — not 'recipe replay', not 'evidence chain'.
What is the one sentence that would make your mum recommend this to her book club?
If your mum's data were accidentally sent somewhere, would she find out, and how?
Does the product make your mum feel smarter or more dependent?
What would your mum's face look like when she first sees the approval dialog?
Is there a version of the onboarding that requires zero technical assistance from you?
What would your mum's first recipe be, and can she create it without reading documentation?
If your mum described this product to her doctor, would her doctor understand why she uses it?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Expand from seed questions to ~100 questions covering the full Mum Test protocol. Rob Fitzpatrick's rule: your mum will lie to protect your feelings. Ask questions that cannot be answered politely. Every answer must describe what ACTUALLY happens when a non-technical user tries each step.
